_publications._publicationTitle: Synergistic effect of Nutlin-3 combined with MG-132 on schwannoma cells through restoration of merlin and p53 tumour suppressors.

_contextSnippet: the viabilities of merlin-positive cells on day 2 following treatment (47.4% of controls; an average of 3 cases) were much lower than those of merlin-null cells (70.3% of controls; P = .034)
details: Merlin-positive cells showed lower viability (47.4% of controls) compared to merlin-null cells (70.3% of controls, P=.034) after treatment
